Notice Of And Motion To Declare X-Complaint At Issue And Order To Vacate Sanctions Against Joseph M. Devine In The Amount Of $250 For Failure To Appear At Osc 1/28/04
Off Calendar Mar-25-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Cross-Complainant San Francisco Housing Authority's Motion to Set Aside Sanction Order issued on 1/28/2004 to Joseph M. Devine, Esq., in the amount of $250.00, and Motion to declare Cross-Complaint at issue is heard this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion to vacate sanctions and to deny Motion to declare Cross-complaint at issue is adopted. Motion is to vacate sanctions is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Motion to delacre Cross-Complaint at issue is ordered denied.
